---
name: business-logic-analysis
description: Use when checking requirements, banking roles, state transitions, calculations, validations, workflows, and business-rule correctness.
---

# Business Logic Analysis

## When To Use

Use for features, bugs, reviews, API changes, data flows, authorization, workflows, and domain rules.

## Check

- Requirement vs implementation
- Roles and permissions
- State transitions
- Validation and error codes
- Data contract compatibility
- Idempotency and duplicate handling
- Edge cases and null/empty behavior
- Downstream integrations
- Audit and reporting implications

## Output

Lead with logic risks by severity. Include exact branches, symbols, or files when possible.
